quotes.text: grug say always, always, always implement thing completely wrong way first, then fix. abstraction is the enemy of understanding for grug.
quotes.author: The Grug Brained Developer

quotes.text: Each layer of abstraction is a layer of bugs, a layer of performance problems, and a layer of things you don't understand.
quotes.author: Jonathan Blow
quotes.source: Preventing the Collapse of Civilization, DevGAMM 2019

quotes.text: All non-trivial abstractions, to some degree, are leaky.
quotes.author: Joel Spolsky

quotes.text: Duplication is far cheaper than the wrong abstraction.
quotes.author: Sandi Metz

quotes.text: All problems in computer science can be solved by another level of indirection... except for the problem of too many layers of indirection.
quotes.author: Butler Lampson (modified)
quotes.source: Attributed, with modification from David Wheeler's original

quotes.text: Premature optimization is the root of all evil. But premature abstraction is the root of all suffering.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: If you're writing boilerplate, you're not programming. You're typing. Find a better abstraction or a better language.
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: Every good abstraction starts as 'this is so simple!' and ends as 'I can't believe how complex this is.'
quotes.author: based

quotes.text: The function of good software is to make the complex appear to be simple.
quotes.author: Grady Booch

quotes.text: The best engineers know that premature abstraction is worse than premature optimization.
quotes.author: based
